title: Community Moderation Update
body:
The moderation team has reviewed and resolved several reports from the past week:

**Actions Taken:**
• 2 users banned for severe violations (spam/phishing and harassment)
• 2 users warned for minor infractions
• 2 reports dismissed after review (including 1 false positive targeting a moderator)

**Trust & Safety:**
Trusted community members (core_maintainer, trusted_helper) were cleared of all reports. The team does not sanction trusted helpers without extensive review.

The moderation queue is now clear.
